_comment: Registry of acceptable content_sources labels. A source cited in frontmatter should start with one of these prefixes; unknown labels WARN at validate-claims time. Add new sources here deliberately: the whole point is that 'the internet' is not a source. min_sources_verified lists categories that need two or more sources before content_review can flip to verified.

sources.full: Gascoyne, Marchand, Desharnais & Américi — Tea: History, Terroirs, Varieties (Camellia Sinensis Tea House)
Mary Lou Heiss & Robert J. Heiss — The Story of Tea / The Tea Enthusiast's Handbook
Tony Gebely — Tea: A User's Guide (teaepicure.com)
Victor Mair & Erling Hoh — The True History of Tea
Jinghong Zhang — Puer Tea: Ancient Caravans and Urban Chic
Lu Yu — The Classic of Tea (茶经, 8th c.), cited via a named translation
Kakuzō Okakura — The Book of Tea (1906)
UN Food and Agriculture Organization tea statistics and reports
International Tea Committee — Annual Bulletin of Statistics
Taiwan Tea Research and Extension Station publications
Royal Botanic Gardens, Kew — Plants of the World Online (botanical names)
German Commission E monographs (herbal safety/traditional use)
European Medicines Agency herbal monographs (traditional-use status)
